full_text: <|endoftext|><photosynthesis_works>Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert light energy into chemical energy. It occurs in the chloroplasts of plant cells and involves the conversion of carbon dioxide and water into glucose and oxygen.</photosynthesis_works>
